actions.script: def results = optionList?.collect { [value: (it.enumId ?: it.statusId), label: it.description] } ?: [] ec.web.sendJsonResponse(results)

pre-actions.script:
// Ensure core dependencies are loaded for this standalone experiment html_stylesheets.add("https://unpkg.com/quasar@2.12.6/dist/quasar.prod.css") footer_scripts.add("https://unpkg.com/vue@3.3.4/dist/vue.global.prod.js") footer_scripts.add("https://unpkg.com/quasar@2.12.6/dist/quasar.umd.prod.js") footer_scripts.add("https://unpkg.com/konva@10/konva.js")
// Resolve component path to public URL String editorUrl = sri.makeUrlByType("component://moqui-ai/screen/moquiai/js/MoquiCanvasEditor.qvt.js", "resource", null, "false").pathWithParams footer_scripts.add(editorUrl)
